ab: makongo ka mangey do sarowap?
en: How do you go to the block-house?

ab: ko meyyaleleh a mangey do sarowap.
en: I drive to the block-house.

ab: makongo so anjin a mangey do pangavavawan?
en: How does he go to the hospital?

ab: ya malam a mangey do pangavavawan.
en: He walks to the hospital.

ab: makongo ka mangey do pengho?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: ko mavang do sikoki a mangey do pengho.
en: I go to Penghu by plane.

ab: makongo ka mangey do pengho?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: ko mavang do avang a mangey do pengho.
en: I go to Penghu by boat.

ab: ikongo mo avangan si maika?
en: How do you go home?

ab: ko mavang do avang aya moli.
en: I go home by boat.

ab: malap, ikongo mo avangan a mangey meyvatvatek?
en: How does malap go to school?

ab: malap, yako mavang do matolatolang aleleh, a mangey do gako.
en: malap goes to school by train.

ab: omis, ikongo mo avangan a mangey do kyokay?
en: How does omis go to church?

ab: ko o mavang do vaziososen no ai a, aleleh. yamangey do kyokay.
en: omis goes to church by bicycle.

ab: ka mangonong a yamange do peyvatvatkan?
en: Do you go to school on foot?

ab: beken, ko mavang do aleleh.
en: No, I go to school by bus.

ab: ka mey yaleleh a mangey do peyvatvatkan?
en: Do you go to school by bicycle?

ab: noon, ko mey yaleleh a mangey do peyvatvatkan.
en: Yes, I go to school by bicycle.

ab: ka mavang do matolatolang a leleh a mangey do takaw?
en: Do you go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail?

ab: noon, ko o mavang do matolatolang a leleh a mangey do takaw.
en: Yes, I go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail.

ab: si mangey ka do tayto am ka mavang do sikoki?
en: Are you going to Taitung by plane?

ab: ko mavang do sikoki ta yamaksez.
en: I will take the plane.

ab: si mangey ka do kyokay am, ka meyyaleleh?
en: Are you going to drive to the church?

ab: ko meyyaleleh a mangey do kyokay.
en: I will drive to the church.

ab: ya masngen o pananazangan do vahey nyo?
en: Is the market close to your house?

ab: ya jyasngen, ta ko pamey yaleleh a yamangey manazang do pananazangan.
ch: B:不近，我都騎摩托車去超市。
en: No, it is not, so I always ride the motorcycle to the market.

ab: ya masngen o yobingkyo do peyvatvatkan?
en: Is the post office close to the school?

ab: ko tongalam a yamangey, tayamasngen.
en: Yes, it is within walking distance.

ab: ya masngen o akakanan do pangapanalan so aleleh?
en: Is the restaurant close to the station?

ab: alima ka vatvatek o ipangonong ka pakaranesrana.
ch: B:出車站再走五分鐘就到了。
en: It only takes five minutes after you walk out of the station.
